noPasteCommandsAvailable: There are no paste actions available.
pasteMultipleNotSupported: You can only paste a single feature or record.
mixedGeometriesNotSupported: Pasted features must have the same geometry type.
clipboardContentsSingle: There is one feature on the clipboard.
clipboardContentsMany: The number of features on the clipboard is: {num}
tooManyCreateFeatures: The maximum number of features you can paste is: {num}.
tooManyCreateComplexFeatures: This form uses functions that limit pasting. The maximum number of features you can paste is: {num}.
pasteAsDesc: Paste features into a different template.
pasteMergeDesc: Merge copied features into a single feature
pasteAppendDesc: Append the copied shape to the selected feature
pasteSubtractDesc: Subtract the copied shape from the selected feature
noSelectedError: You must select a feature to continue.
deletesGeometryError: Unable to create a null geometry.
noGeometryError: The selected feature does not have geometry.
